title: Food Allergen Assistant
subtitle: A Telegram food-allergen assistant that combines MCP tools and RAG to provide fast, concise safety verdicts.

sections.title: Project Overview
sections.body: This project is an MCP-enabled food-allergen assistant that delivers concise risk verdicts by combining recipe and medical evidence retrieval, optional menu-image OCR, and cross-provider LLM inference across CLI and Telegram, with an evaluation pipeline comparing performance with versus without tool use.

highlights: Engineered a Python-based allergen risk assistant using MCP tool orchestration, combining ChromaDB-backed recipe retrieval and medical evidence search, OCR-based menu parsing, and policy-constrained LLM decision logic in a unified text-and-image inference pipeline
Built a multi-interface RAG system (CLI and Telegram) with persistent user allergen profiles and dynamic provider/model routing
Designed and ran a four-configuration evaluation harness, where tool-augmented inference improved baseline accuracy by 16.6% and recall by 21.2%
